info.title: ETA Service (gRPC)
info.description:
gRPC-only service. Wraps the Google Maps Distance Matrix API to return travel time estimates between two coordinates. Exposed on port 50054 (env: `GRPC_PORT`). There are no HTTP endpoints — the paths below represent gRPC RPCs using the standard gRPC-over-HTTP/2 URI convention (`/<package>.<Service>/<Method>`).

**Proto package:** `eta`  
**Service:** `ETAService`  
**Transport mode priority:** transit → walking → stub (if no Google Maps key)

post.description: Returns the estimated travel time in minutes between an origin and destination coordinate pair. Tries Google Maps transit routing first; falls back to walking; falls back to a configurable stub value if `GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY` is not set.

400.description: gRPC INVALID_ARGUMENT — one or more coordinates are missing

500.description: gRPC INTERNAL — Google Maps API error or unexpected failure

dest_lat.description: Latitude of the destination (clinic). Set via `CLINIC_LAT` env var on the caller side.

dest_lng.description: Longitude of the destination (clinic). Set via `CLINIC_LNG` env var on the caller side.

mode.description: Transport mode used to calculate the estimate

source.description: Data source used. `stub` indicates Google Maps was unavailable or not configured.
